Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.primary_clothing: Classic robe or suit, topped with a round felt hat.
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Believes in temperance to avoid loss of control; skilled in 'luck' based ritual magic.
Old Neil.source_notes: Discusses Mystery Pryer philosophy and wears a round felt hat while out.

Klein Moretti.eye_color: brown (turns deep black during divination or Cogitation)
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Silk hat, black Victorian suit, holding a black cane
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: Dark gold member cufflinks with Hermes root word for 'fortune-teller' inscribed, topaz pendant hanging from his sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Details on his new club membership items and tools.

Sir Deweyville.primary_clothing: High-end black frock coat, stiff white wing-collar shirt, and a silk cravat
Sir Deweyville.face_description: Distinguished and refined features with a high brow and a stern yet idealistic philanthropic expression.
Sir Deweyville.visual_anchor: elderly distinguished gentleman in a high-end black frock coat and silk cravat, with a look of a wealthy Victorian philanthropist
Sir Deweyville.color_palette: charcoal black, silk white, navy blue
Sir Deweyville.distinguishing_features: Founder of Deweyville Trust; provides cheap housing; incredibly wealthy (doesn't know exact count of 300+ pounds).
Sir Deweyville.source_notes: Identified as the owner of the lost wallet and a respected knight/philanthropist.

Deweyville's Butler.primary_clothing: black formal suit, black bow tie, white shirt
Deweyville's Butler.face_description: Clean-shaven, professional and polite expression, slightly weathered but dignified features.
Deweyville's Butler.visual_anchor: mid-40s male butler, fair skin, short neat black hair, wearing a black formal suit and black bow tie, professional and polite demeanor.
Deweyville's Butler.color_palette: deep black, crisp white, charcoal grey
Deweyville's Butler.source_notes: Appears to retrieve Sir Deweyville's lost wallet.

Audrey Hall.hair_style: long blond hair coiled in an elegant bun
Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: collared, high-waisted, pale-white dress with engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline; white-silk gloves; white dancing shoes with roses and diamonds.
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Currently acting in the 'Spectator' role, observing minute details of social interactions.
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Detailed description of her banquet attire and her internal 'Spectator' observations.

Earl Wolf's youngest son.primary_clothing: Elegant Victorian noble evening suit, likely dark velvet or fine wool.
Earl Wolf's youngest son.face_description: Youthful, expressive face; tends to move his forearms frequently while speaking to reinforce his words.
Earl Wolf's youngest son.visual_anchor: early 20s male noble, blond hair, expressive gestures, wearing an elegant evening suit at a ballroom banquet.
Earl Wolf's youngest son.source_notes: Mentioned as a guest at the banquet Audrey attends.

Viscount Conrad's daughter.primary_clothing: High-society ballroom gown with intricate lace and silk details.
Viscount Conrad's daughter.face_description: Refined features, polite and attentive expression while listening to Earl Wolf's son.
Viscount Conrad's daughter.visual_anchor: early 20s female noble, pale skin, brunette hair in an elegant updo, wearing a fine ballroom gown.
Viscount Conrad's daughter.source_notes: Mentioned as a guest at the banquet.

Duchess Della.primary_clothing: Luxurious emerald green silk Victorian gown with black lace trim and a wide-brimmed feathered hat.
Duchess Della.face_description: Elegant and refined features, high cheekbones, thin arching brows, and a poised, aristocratic air.
Duchess Della.visual_anchor: early 40s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in an updo, wearing a luxurious emerald green silk Victorian gown and a feathered hat
Duchess Della.accessories: pure ocean-blue sapphire (ring or jewelry piece).
Duchess Della.source_notes: Seen at the banquet showing off her sapphire.

Baron Larry.primary_clothing: Formal noble evening attire, dark tailcoat and white waistcoat.
Baron Larry.face_description: Cheerful and charming face, often seen making others laugh.
Baron Larry.visual_anchor: mid-30s male noble, light brown hair, charming smile, wearing formal evening attire.
Baron Larry.source_notes: Mentioned as a guest flirting with Madam Parnes.

Madam Parnes.primary_clothing: Sophisticated evening gown with silk embroidery.
Madam Parnes.face_description: Expressive eyes that occasionally dart with guilt, beautiful but nervous.
Madam Parnes.visual_anchor: mid-30s female, fair skin, dark brown curls, wearing a sophisticated evening gown, expressive hazel eyes.
Madam Parnes.source_notes: Mentioned as a guest at the banquet.

Susie.face_description: Friendly and remarkably intelligent golden retriever face, featuring a soft muzzle and expressive, bright eyes.
Susie.visual_anchor: Intelligent golden retriever dog with lustrous golden fur and bright brown eyes, often sitting with an air of capable assistance.
Susie.color_palette: golden yellow, warm brown, creamy white
Susie.distinguishing_features: Sitting silently in shadows, watching Audrey like a 'Spectator'.
Susie.source_notes: Found observing Audrey at the end of the chapter.

William I.primary_clothing: Royal military or ceremonial robes (as depicted on currency).
William I.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a prominent brow and authoritative gaze.
William I.visual_anchor: Elderly male monarch, grey hair and beard, stern authoritative face, depicted on gold pound notes.
William I.distinguishing_features: Known as the Founder and Protector.
William I.source_notes: Mentioned as the figure on the ten-pound notes.
